examples: "Flamingos have evolved very leathery skin on their legs so they can tolerate the salt water," says David Harper, a professor at the University of Leicester.
Her skin was leathery, her hands rough.
Floating inside was a leathery ball-shaped object.
The shell is flexible and covered in a black leathery skin - hence the name leatherback.
Mel Gibson is leathery but quick and alert, his eyes darting this way and that.
